Number of Certificates 2,000
Notional Amount per
Certificate (N) 1 Certificate = USD 1,000
Currency USD
Minimum Trading Size 1 Certificate (and multiples of 1 Certificate thereafter)
Issue Price per
Certificate 100.00%
Trade Date January 04th, 2025
Strike Date January 04th, 2025
Issue Date January 11th, 2025
Last Trading Date January 05th, 2027
Redemption Valuation
Date January 05th, 2027
Redemption Date January 12th, 2027
Automatic Early
Redemption
If, on January 06th, 2026, the official closing level of the Underlying Index is greater than or equal to
the Automatic Early Redemption Level, then the Issuer shall redeem each Certificate on January
13th, 2026 at the Automatic Early Redemption Amount calculated as follows:
N x 112.00%
Automatic Early
Redemption Level 100% x IndexInitial, i.e. 4,800.00
Final Redemption On the Redemption Date, if the Certificates have not been automatically early redeemed or
purchased and cancelled by the Issuer prior to the Redemption Valuation Date, the Issuer shall
redeem each Certificate at the following Cash Settlement Amount:
1) If a Kick-out Event has not occurred:
GENERAL INFORMATION
2) If a Kick-out Event has occurred:
Kick-out Level 60% x IndexInitial, i.e. 2,880.00
Kick-out Determination
Day The Redemption Valuation Date.
Kick-out Event A Kick-out Event shall be deemed to occur if, at the Kick-out Valuation Time on the Kick-out
Determination Day, the Underlying Index closes at a level strictly less than the Kick-out Level.
Issuer BNP Paribas Issuance B.V.
Guarantor BNP Paribas (S&P's A+ / Moody's A1 / Fitch A+)
Calculation Agent BNP Paribas Financial Markets S.N.C.
